tool_args.label: Total Revenue November YTD
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue of $1,104.2 million was $51.0 million favorable to the forecast.

tool_args.label: Revenue Favorable Variance
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue of $1,104.2 million was $51.0 million favorable to the forecast.

tool_args.label: Total Ridership November YTD
tool_args.raw_text: Through November 2025, ridership was 74.7 million which was 9.1% above 2024 and 0.3% below the forecast.

tool_args.label: Commutation Ridership YTD November
tool_args.raw_text: Commutation ridership of 28.2 million was 10.6% above 2024 and 5.7% below the forecast.

tool_args.label: Non-Commutation Ridership YTD November
tool_args.raw_text: Non-Commutation ridership of 46.5 million was 8.2% above 2024 and 3.3% above the forecast.

tool_args.label: Farebox Revenue YTD November
tool_args.raw_text: the farebox revenue of $635.8 million was $0.1 million higher than the forecast

tool_args.label: Total Expenses before Non-Cash Liabilities YTD November
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments of $2,205.2 million were $10.1 million or 0.5% favorable to the forecast.

tool_args.label: Total Headcount
tool_args.raw_text: Total headcount was 7,828, which was 171 positions lower than the forecast.

tool_args.label: Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio YTD November
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date November Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio was 39.3%, which was above the forecast due to higher farebox revenue and lower expenses.

tool_args.label: Adjusted Cost Per Passenger YTD November
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date November Adjusted Cost per Passenger was $23.46, which was lower than the forecast due to lower ridership and lower expenses.

tool_args.label: Revenue Per Passenger YTD November
tool_args.raw_text: The year-to-date November Revenue per Passenger was $8.51, which was above the forecast due to a higher yield per passenger.

tool_args.label: LIRR Revenue November 2025
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR revenue totaled $58.3 million in November 2025, $1.5 million or 2.5% lower than the forecast.

tool_args.label: Variance Explanation Total Expenses November Forecast vs Actual
tool_args.raw_text: Total Expenses $19.7 0.8% Favorable labor expenses due to lower average pay rates reflecting new hires and associated fringe costs, and the timing of pension payments, partially offset by FELA related costs. Favorable non-labor expenses resulting from higher project reimbursement for vehicles and work train usage, timing of the JCC building assessment, Moynihan train hall expenses, design and demolition plan of an existing building and security services, partially offset by timing of pooled material chargeout, miscellaneous inventory reserve adjustment, and increase in bad debt reserves.

payload.claim_text: Total Expenses $19.7 million favorable (0.8%) vs November Forecast for Non-Reimbursable November 2025 Year-to-Date. Favorable labor expenses due to lower average pay rates reflecting new hires and associated fringe costs, and the timing of pension payments, partially offset by FELA related costs. Favorable non-labor expenses resulting from higher project reimbursement for vehicles and work train usage, timing of the JCC building assessment, Moynihan train hall expenses, design and demolition plan of an existing building and security services, partially offset by timing of pooled material chargeout, miscellaneous inventory reserve adjustment, and increase in bad debt reserves.

tool_args.label: Preliminary close and subject to review
tool_args.raw_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
